prompt: We've just finished a big architecture session — I stored a lot of decisions and relationships. Can you verify everything looks consistent before we wrap up?
setup: Graph pre-seeded with 12 entities across decisions, constraints, components, dependencies, and preferences.
assertions: Claude summarizes what vulcan_audit returned — entities checked and violations found (if any)
If violations are found, Claude offers to retract or correct them via vulcan_retract or vulcan_transact
Claude does not skip the audit and generically claim consistency
Claude explains what the audit covers (schema validation, entity-type checks)
